title: Construction extraction outputs from WWF Living Planet Reports
author: Pannitto, Ludovica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains the outputs of construction-based extraction applied to the WWF Living Planet Reports corpus. The data include extracted construction instances and validation results used to estimate extraction precision. 
 The extraction was performed using Grew queries operationalizing CASA constructions over a UD-annotated version of the corpus. 
 Each sheet corresponds to a construction and/or subcorpus.
